suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Ensure feature descriptions referencing test names are kept in sync with actual test names in full_cycle_wiring.rs. The feature description for refactor-04-tier2-test-unblocking referenced 'wiring_validation_failure_transitions_task_to_failed', 'wiring_pretool_hook_denial_blocks_commit', and 'wiring_budget_exceeded_pauses_task' but only two matching tests exist: 'wiring_pre_tool_denial_fails_task_not_done' and 'wiring_cost_guard_pauses_at_budget_limit'.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature refactor-04-tier2-test-unblocking review found documentation mismatch between feature description and actual test names.
